    A

    actor(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     
    addEvent(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Adds an event to the current span.
    addEvent(String, Attributes) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Adds an event with attributes to the current span.
    append(ILoggingEvent) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.logging.OtlpLogbackAppender
     
    args(Object[]) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     
    audit(ProceedingJoinPoint, AuditLog) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditLogAspect
     
    AuditEvent - Class in io.signoz.springboot.audit
    Immutable model representing a single audit trail entry.
    AuditEvent.Builder - Class in io.signoz.springboot.audit
     
    AuditEvent.Outcome - Enum in io.signoz.springboot.audit
    Outcome of the audited operation.
    AuditLogAspect - Class in io.signoz.springboot.audit
    AOP aspect that captures audit trail entries for all methods annotated with AuditLog.
    AuditLogAspect(ApplicationEventPublisher, SigNozAuditProperties) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditLogAspect
     

    B

    B3 - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozTracingProperties.PropagationFormat
    B3 single-header format (compatible with Zipkin).
    B3_MULTI - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozTracingProperties.PropagationFormat
    B3 multi-header format.
    BOTH - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozLoggingProperties.LoggingMode
    Both OTLP and JSON simultaneously (default).
    build() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     
    builder() - Static method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent
     
    Builder() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     

    C

    className(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     
    currentSpanId() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Returns the span ID of the current active span, or "0000000000000000".
    currentTraceId() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Returns the trace ID of the current active span, or "0000000000000000" if there is no active span.

    FullMaskingStrategy - Class in io.signoz.springboot.masking
    Masking strategy that replaces the entire value with a fixed placeholder.

    fullMatch(String) - Static method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.RegexMaskingStrategy
    Builds a strategy that replaces the full match with "***".

    J

    M

    mask(String, String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.FullMaskingStrategy
     
    mask(String, String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskingRegistry
    Returns the masked value for a given field name and raw value.
    mask(String, String) - Method in interface io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskingStrategy
    Masks the given raw value.
    mask(String, String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.PartialMaskingStrategy
     
    mask(String, String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.RegexMaskingStrategy
     
    maskArguments(ProceedingJoinPoint) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskedArgumentAspect
    Intercept all public methods on Spring beans where at least one parameter has the @Masked annotation.
    MaskedArgumentAspect - Class in io.signoz.springboot.masking
    AOP aspect that intercepts bean method calls and replaces @Masked-annotated arguments with their masked representation before the method executes.
    MaskedArgumentAspect(MaskingRegistry) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskedArgumentAspect
     
    MaskingRegistry - Class in io.signoz.springboot.masking
    Central registry that maps field names and patterns to their MaskingStrategy.
    MaskingRegistry(SigNozLoggingProperties) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskingRegistry
     
    MaskingStrategy - Interface in io.signoz.springboot.masking
    Strategy interface for masking a sensitive field value before it is written to logs.
    maskJsonString(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskingRegistry
    Masks all values in a simple JSON string by scanning for "fieldName":"value" patterns where the field is sensitive.
    maskMessage(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskingRegistry
    Applies all registered message-level regex patterns to a free-form log message.
    methodName(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     

    O

    onAuditEvent(AuditEvent) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.SigNozAuditHandler
     
    openTelemetry() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.OpenTelemetrySdkConfig
     
    OpenTelemetrySdkConfig - Class in io.signoz.springboot.tracing
    Spring @Configuration that bootstraps the OpenTelemetry SDK and registers it as the global OpenTelemetry instance.
    OpenTelemetrySdkConfig(SigNozProperties) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.OpenTelemetrySdkConfig
     
    OTLP - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozLoggingProperties.LoggingMode
    Send logs to SigNoz via OTLP gRPC.
    OtlpLogbackAppender - Class in io.signoz.springboot.logging
    Logback AppenderBase implementation that forwards log records to a SigNoz (or any OpenTelemetry-compatible) collector via OTLP gRPC.
    OtlpLogbackAppender() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.logging.OtlpLogbackAppender
     
    otlpMeterRegistry() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.metrics.SigNozMetricsConfig
     
    outcome(AuditEvent.Outcome) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder
     

    P

    PartialMaskingStrategy - Class in io.signoz.springboot.masking
    Masking strategy that reveals a configurable number of characters at the start and end of the value while masking the rest with asterisks.
    PartialMaskingStrategy() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.masking.PartialMaskingStrategy
    Default: show 2 characters at start and end, mask middle with *.
    PartialMaskingStrategy(int, int, char) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.masking.PartialMaskingStrategy
     
    PatternConfig() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozLoggingProperties.PatternConfig
     

    R

    recordException(Throwable) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Records an exception on the current span and marks it as errored.
    RegexMaskingStrategy - Class in io.signoz.springboot.masking
    Masking strategy that applies a regex to the raw value, replacing every match with a fixed replacement string.
    RegexMaskingStrategy(String, String) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.masking.RegexMaskingStrategy
     
    register(String, MaskingStrategy) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskingRegistry
    Registers a custom strategy for a specific field name at runtime.

    scope(Span) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Makes the span the current span and returns a Scope that must be closed.

    Adds a string attribute to the current span.

    SigNozAuditHandler - Class in io.signoz.springboot.audit
    Default AuditEvent handler that writes a structured audit log entry via SLF4J using the AUDIT marker.
    SigNozAuditHandler() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.audit.SigNozAuditHandler
     
    SigNozAuditProperties - Class in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    Audit log configuration under signoz.audit.*.
    SigNozAuditProperties() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozAuditProperties
     
    SigNozJsonEncoder - Class in io.signoz.springboot.logging
    Custom Logback encoder that wraps LogstashEncoder (Logstash-compatible JSON) and applies MaskingRegistry masking to every log record before serialisation.
    SigNozJsonEncoder() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.logging.SigNozJsonEncoder
     
    SigNozLoggingProperties - Class in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    Logging-specific configuration nested under signoz.logging.*.
    SigNozLoggingProperties() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozLoggingProperties
     
    SigNozLoggingProperties.LoggingMode - Enum in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    Output mode for log records.
    SigNozLoggingProperties.PatternConfig - Class in io.signoz.springboot.properties
     
    SigNozMetricsConfig - Class in io.signoz.springboot.metrics
    Configures Micrometer to export metrics to SigNoz via the OTLP registry.
    SigNozMetricsConfig(SigNozProperties) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.metrics.SigNozMetricsConfig
     
    SigNozProperties - Class in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    Root configuration properties for the SigNoz Spring Boot Starter.
    SigNozProperties() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozProperties
     
    SigNozTracer - Class in io.signoz.springboot.tracing
    Thin Spring-managed wrapper around the OpenTelemetry Tracer.
    SigNozTracer(OpenTelemetry) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
     
    SigNozTracingProperties - Class in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    Tracing-specific configuration nested under signoz.tracing.*.
    SigNozTracingProperties() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozTracingProperties
     
    SigNozTracingProperties.PropagationFormat - Enum in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    Propagation format for distributed context.
    SigNozWebProperties - Class in io.signoz.springboot.properties
    HTTP request/response logging configuration under signoz.web.*.
    SigNozWebProperties() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozWebProperties

    Exposes a SpanBuilder for custom span configuration.

    start() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.logging.OtlpLogbackAppender

    Creates and starts a new span.
    startSpan(String, SpanKind) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.SigNozTracer
    Creates and starts a new span with the given kind.

    trace(ProceedingJoinPoint) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.TracedAspect
     
    TracedAspect - Class in io.signoz.springboot.tracing
    AOP aspect that creates an OpenTelemetry span around every method annotated with Traced (or every public method on a class annotated with Traced).
    TracedAspect(SigNozTracer) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.tracing.TracedAspect
     
    traceId(String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent.Builder

    W
